invoice-import.step1.title: Upload CSV File
invoice-import.step1.description: Select a CSV file with invoice data. The file should match the format used by the invoice export feature.
invoice-import.step1.format.title: CSV File Format
invoice-import.step1.format.description: Required fields (must have values): Series Name, Series ID, Date, Language, Buyer Name, Seller, Item Name, Item Unit, Item Amount, Item Price. Other fields can be empty. Multiple rows with the same Series Name, Series ID, and Date will be grouped as line items. Example:
invoice-import.step1.format.sample:
"Series Name","Series ID","Date","Invoice Type","Language","Buyer Name","Buyer VAT No","Buyer Country","Seller","Issuer","Email","Extra","Item Name","Item Unit","Item Amount","Item Price","Notes","Paid","Locked","Sent"
"INV",1,"2024-01-15","standard","en","Example LLC","GB123456789","GB","Seller Name","Issuer Name","buyer@example.com","","Consulting","H87",10,50.00,"","no","no","no"
"INV",2,"2024-01-16","standard","en","Client Ltd","GB987654321","GB","Seller Name","Issuer Name","client@example.com","","Development","H87",5,100.00,"","no","no","no"
invoice-import.step1.file-input.label: Select CSV file
invoice-import.step1.error.title: Error
invoice-import.step1.file-info.title: File Information
invoice-import.step2.title: Review and Select Invoices
invoice-import.step2.description: Review the parsed invoices and select which ones to import. Only valid invoices can be selected.
invoice-import.step2.no-invoices: No invoices found in the uploaded file.
invoice-import.step2.errors.title: Errors
invoice-import.step2.warnings.title: Warnings
invoice-import.step3.title: Importing Invoices
invoice-import.step3.cancel.title: Cancel Import?

invoice-import.step4.description: The import has finished. Review the results below.
